title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.051 - Special board meetings, how called — notice
text:
162.051.  Special board meetings, how called — notice. — Special meetings of school boards may be held at the times fixed by the board, or on the call of the president or of a majority of the members of the board.  Each member shall be notified of the time, place and purpose of the meeting.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-5)
